creator: gordont@gnf.org
text:
This patch fixes the following problems:
* cfengine deadlocking in the resolver due to being linked against libc_r
* cfd issuing 'ioctl:  No such network device' whenever it is invoked.

While we are at it, update my email address and add some optional
documentation that I should have added earlier.

Patches obtained from Michael Kyle <mike@rainc.com>
They were slightly massaged to fit better.

How-To-Repeat: 	run cfd. run cfengine and wait for it to deadlock.
